mapper.select: SELECT corporation_cd , corporation_nm FROM om_corporation_m WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY corporation_cd

where.if: AND (corporation_cd ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR corporation_nm ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR COALESCE(corporation_info ->> 'business_no', '') ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR COALESCE(corporation_info ->> 'tel_no', '') ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR COALESCE(corporation_info ->> 'email', '') ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT corporation_cd , corporation_nm , corporation_info ->> 'business_no' AS business_no , corporation_info ->> 'tel_no' AS tel_no , corporation_info ->> 'email' AS email , to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM om_corporation_m
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT corporation_cd , corporation_nm , corporation_info ->> 'business_no' AS business_no , corporation_info ->> 'tel_no' AS tel_no , corporation_info ->> 'email' AS email , to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM om_corporation_m
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT corporation_cd , corporation_nm , corporation_info ->> 'business_no' AS business_no , corporation_info ->> 'tel_no' AS tel_no , corporation_info ->> 'email' AS email , to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM om_corporation_m WHERE corporation_cd = #{corporationCd}

SELECT corporation_cd AS corporationCd , corporation_nm AS corporationNm , corporation_info ->> 'business_no' AS businessNo , corporation_info ->> 'tel_no' AS telNo , corporation_info ->> 'email' AS email , corporation_info ->> 'ceo_nm' AS ceoNm , corporation_info ->> 'address' AS address , corporation_info ->> 'fax_no' AS faxNo , corporation_info ->> 'homepage_url' AS homepageUrl , corporation_info ->> 'remark' AS remark , is_active AS isActive , to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt , to_char(updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updatedAt , created_by AS createdBy , updated_by AS updatedBy FROM om_corporation_m WHERE corporation_cd = #{corporationCd}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(corporation_cd FROM 6) AS INTEGER)), 0) FROM om_corporation_m WHERE corporation_cd ~ '^CORP-[0-9]{4}$' AND LENGTH(corporation_cd) = 9
